zh.Wiebelskirchen, Ottweiler, Rhineland, Pr: 海因里希_海普洛文次奧特維利維貝爾斯吉陳
zh.Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France: 法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾姆利豪森
zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich Leibenguth於大約1640年出生在瑞士波阿爾萬根時，他的父親Rudolf Leibenguth21歲，母親Verena Mumenthaler24歲。他於1676年10月6日與Maria Müller在瑞士波梅爾瑙結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1715年之前在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾姆利豪森。

zh-hans.Wiebelskirchen, Ottweiler, Rhineland, Pr: 海因里希_海普洛文次奧特維利維貝爾斯吉陳
zh-hans.Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France: 法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾姆利豪森
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich Leibenguth于大约1640年出生在瑞士波阿爾萬根时，他的父亲Rudolf Leibenguth21岁，母亲Verena Mumenthaler24岁。他于1676年10月6日与Maria Müller在瑞士波梅爾瑙结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1715年之前在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾姆利豪森。

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

historicEvents.description: All European peace treaty formally accepts Switzerland as an independent nation.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich Leibenguth was born about 1640, in Aarwangen, Bern, Switzerland, his father, Rudolf Leibenguth, was 21 and his mother, Verena Mumenthaler, was 24. He married Maria Müller on 6 October 1676, in Melchnau, Bern, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died before 1715, in Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich Leibenguth est né environ 1640, à Aarwangen, Berne, Suisse, son père, Rudolf Leibenguth, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Verena Mumenthaler, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Maria Müller le 6 octobre 1676, à Melchnau, Berne, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé avant 1715, à Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich Leibenguth um 1640 in Aarwangen, Bern, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rudolf Leibenguth 21 und seine Mutter Verena Mumenthaler 24. Er hat am 6. Oktober 1676 in Melchnau, Bern, Schweiz Maria Müller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb vor 1715 in Mühlhausen, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich Leibenguth è nato il circa 1640 nel Aarwangen, Berna, Svizzera, il suo padre, Rudolf Leibenguth, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Verena Mumenthaler, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Maria Müller il 6 ottobre 1676, nel Melchnau, Berna, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì prima del 1715, nel Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich Leibenguthが約1640年にスイスバーンアールワンジェンで生まれた時，父Rudolf Leibenguthは21歳，母Verena Mumenthalerは24歳であった。1676年10月6日にスイスバーンメルチナウでMaria Müllerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1715年以前にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンムルハウセンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich Leibenguth(이)가 대략 1640년 스위스 버 아아왕에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rudolf Leibenguth(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Verena Mumenthaler(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1676년 10월 6일 스위스 버 멜ch나에서 Maria Müller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1715년 이전 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 뮐하우센에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich Leibenguth nasceu aproximadamente 1640, em Aarwangen, Bern, Suiça, seu pai, Rudolf Leibenguth, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Verena Mumenthaler, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Müller em 6 de outubro de 1676, em Melchnau, Bern, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1715, em Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich Leibenguth родился около 1640 г. в местности аарванген, бирн, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Rudolf Leibenguth было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Verena Mumenthaler, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Müller 6 октября 1676 г. в местности мелчнау, бирн, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер перед 1715 г. в местности мулхаусен, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция.

sm.about 1640–before 1715: e tusa o le 1640–a'e le'I oo le 1715

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich Leibenguth nació aproximadamente 1640, en Aarwangen, Bern, Suiza, su papá, Rudolf Leibenguth, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Verena Mumenthaler, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Maria Müller el 6 de octubre de 1676, en Melchnau, Bern, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió antes de 1715, en Mulhausen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.
